title: Break Time for USMLE Step 2 Clinical Skills (CS) Examinations
citation: ECFMG. Break Time for USMLE Step 2 Clinical Skills (CS) Examinations. Feb 5, 2015. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Historical Step 2 CS break cadence and whole-exam session structure for station-sequencing inspiration.
claims_supported: The Step 2 CS exam consisted of 12 patient encounters and lasted approximately 8 hours.
The historical break schedule included breaks after the 3rd, 6th, and 9th patient encounters.
claims_not_supported: That OpenClinXR must duplicate the former exam schedule exactly.
That OpenClinXR can claim ECFMG, USMLE, or NBME endorsement.
